name: Stroganoff Superb
recipeIngredient: 1 lb round steak, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 3 tablespoons butter or margarine in a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Melt for 30 seconds in the Microwave Oven.
2. Add steak strips to butter and heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 10 minutes or until meat is browned.
3. Add onion, mushrooms, and seasoning to meat. Heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 4 minutes.
4. Add cubed cream cheese and milk to meat mixture and heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until cheese melts. Stir occasionally. Serve over hot parsleyed noodles.
